film.title: Love at first sight
film.overview: Ajay saves Anju in a fall from a mountain height, it is love at first sight. He doesn't know that she is engaged, and they don't know they have a past together.

dialogues.dialogue: In every stride there is an attitude.  I am in love with you.  I shamelessly said yes.  My eyes pact this agreement.  Your eyes which slowly bowed down.. ..in that I found your answer. I salute you."
Here I am winning.  But at the border it is important to win over the enemy.  It is a matter of pride.  Major Shahi, you have won all the wars until now.  Then why do you worry about this war?

Anju.  Anju, you were praising this man. He doubts a lot.  He is full of pride. He is not true to his motherland.  We are surprised by his behavior since the first day.  How will you spend your whole life with him?
